text.title: Django Coding Practices Procedure
text.summary: 6-step procedure to apply the practices-django-coding methodology end-to-end.

step.name: scaffold-app
step.action: Run python manage.py startapp <name>; register in INSTALLED_APPS; add urls.py.

step.name: model-first
step.action: Define models with explicit Meta.ordering, clean(), and a custom QuerySet exposed via .as_manager().

step.name: service-or-form
step.action: Implement service functions wrapped in @transaction.atomic for any multi-write flow.

step.name: thin-views
step.action: Implement views/ViewSets using DRF generics; keep each method <30 lines; use select_related/prefetch_related on querysets.

step.name: settings-split
step.action: Split into settings/base.py + settings/dev.py + settings/prod.py; move secrets to env vars.
